character.name: Jasmine
character.reference_image: Grok-generated reference — Bangkok city street, black scoop-neck t-shirt, black high-waist jeans,

face_lock.description: EXACT same face as Jasmine reference in EVERY image — zero deviation allowed.
face_lock.face_shape: Broad oval face with wide prominent cheekbones — not round, face has width and structure
face_lock.cheeks: Wide set with prominent cheekbones — face width is the defining structural feature, no flush, no redness, even natural skin tone
face_lock.cheekbones: Wide and prominent — the most defining structural feature of her face
face_lock.jawline: Soft, moderately defined, blends into neck — not sharp, not weak
face_lock.eyes: East Asian almond eyes, slightly hooded, relaxed and natural — not wide open, not narrow
face_lock.eyelid: Natural single or subtle double eyelid — soft, not dramatic
face_lock.eye_size: Medium — natural, not large, not small
face_lock.eye_color: Dark brown with warm hazel undertone
face_lock.signature_liner: None — completely bare eye, no liner whatsoever
face_lock.brow_shape: Medium thickness, natural straight-to-soft arch, dark brown, ungroomed natural look
face_lock.nose: Medium nose, straight bridge, soft natural tip — not upturned, not wide, proportionate to face width
face_lock.lips: Medium fullness, natural bare pink tone, soft natural shape, no exaggerated cupid's bow
face_lock.beauty_mark: 2–3 small acne marks / post-inflammatory spots on left cheek — permanent identity marker. NO freckles — skin is even with isolated marks only, no freckle scatter pattern.
face_lock.skin_tone: Fair with warm neutral-peachy undertone — even toned, no flush, no redness anywhere
face_lock.skin_texture: Visible natural pores, 2–3 acne marks on left cheek, natural skin — real skin not airbrushed. NO freckles.
face_lock.expression: Calm, natural, neutral — not seductive, not overly warm, just real and approachable
face_lock.overall_face_prompt: broad oval face with wide prominent cheekbones, medium-wide forehead, East Asian almond eyes slightly hooded relaxed and natural, dark brown warm hazel irises, clean bare lashes no liner, medium thickness natural dark brows, medium straight-bridged nose with soft natural tip, medium fullness natural bare-pink lips soft natural shape, soft moderately defined jawline, fair even-toned skin with warm neutral-peachy undertone no flush no redness anywhere, visible natural pores on cheeks and nose, 2–3 small acne marks on left cheek, no freckles, natural slight under-eye shadow, identical facial proportions and bone structure, zero face morphing allowed

hair.base_color: Very dark black-brown — uniform deep dark color, no visible highlights or colour variation
hair.texture: Poker straight, silky smooth — zero waves, zero frizz, glass-like shine
hair.length: Very long, past chest and shoulders
hair.style_default: Straight and flowing, falls in two clean panels over both shoulders

body_type.classification: Voluptuous hourglass — thicc and curvy with a clearly defined waist. Full figured but NOT obese. The waist-to-hip contrast is the defining feature.
body_type.bust: Very large natural bust, heavy with natural drop and weight — deep prominent cleavage, full and womanly
body_type.midsection: Soft natural midsection — not flat, not bloated. A visible defined waist separates bust from hips clearly.
body_type.waist: Clearly defined inward waist — the most important shape marker. Narrower than both bust and hips, creating the hourglass silhouette
body_type.hips: Wide full hips — substantially wider than waist, creating dramatic hourglass ratio
body_type.thighs: Full thick thighs — substantial, touching at inner thigh, womanly not flabby
body_type.arms: Full soft arms — feminine, not muscular, not bony
body_type.overall: Voluptuous thicc hourglass — curvy, full-figured, and womanly with a clear waist definition. Think pinup model or Marilyn Monroe body type. NOT obese, NOT BBW — the waist is always visible and defined.
body_type.physical_reference: Body ratio reference: 40DDD-30-44 — full hourglass, approx 70kg / 5ft4 frame

skin_texture.base_tone: Fair skin with warm neutral-peachy undertone — even toned throughout, no flush, no redness, no pink cast

pores.face: Visible natural pores across cheeks and nose — wider pore zone on nose wings and nose bridge

acne_marks.left_cheek: 2–3 small acne marks / post-inflammatory spots — FIXED placement, always present — this is a permanent identity marker
acne_marks.right_cheek: Slightly cleaner than left cheek — natural asymmetry

skin_texture.moles: None visible — no defined moles on face or body
skin_texture.freckles: Absent — skin is relatively even with isolated marks only, no freckle scatter pattern
skin_texture.under_eye: Very subtle natural shadow under both eyes — not dark circles, just natural anatomical depth, no puffiness
skin_texture.lip_texture: Natural medium texture, no dryness lines, no heavy creasing — naturally smooth with subtle natural lip lines
skin_texture.forehead: Clean and smooth — no marks, no lines, no texture issues
skin_texture.décolletage: Clean, smooth, fair skin on chest and neck — no marks, no pigmentation
skin_texture.body_skin: Clean, even, fair — no marks or pigmentation on arms, shoulders or visible body skin
skin_texture.finish_default: Matte natural — no shine, no glow, no oiliness anywhere

finish_variants.gym_content: Light sweat sheen on forehead and collarbones only — rest of skin stays matte
finish_variants.beach_content: Slightly sun-warmed tone, natural warmth — still no shine or oiliness
finish_variants.post_shower: Dewy glow — slightly more luminous than default but never oily or plastic

skin_texture.anti_rules: NEVER airbrushed, NEVER plastic, NEVER glass skin, NEVER porcelain, NEVER beauty filtered — always real human skin
skin_texture.texture_prompt: fair even-toned skin with warm neutral-peachy undertone, visible natural pores on cheeks and nose, 2-3 small acne marks on left cheek, natural slight under-eye shadow, clean smooth forehead and chin, matte natural skin finish, zero skin smoothing, zero beauty filter, real human skin texture
skin_texture.negative_additions: rosy flush, pink cheeks, blushing, flushed skin, redness on cheeks, glass skin, porcelain skin, airbrushed skin, skin smoothing, beauty filter, oily skin, shiny skin, plastic skin

jewellery_base.note: Not established from reference image — no visible jewellery in reference shot. Define per post or establish in next reference session.

default_makeup.description: Jasmine's baseline is a clean, minimal, fresh-faced look.
default_makeup.skin_finish: Matte natural — even-toned, no glow, no flush
default_makeup.foundation: Very light or none — skin texture and natural marks fully visible
default_makeup.eyeliner: None — clean natural lash line only
default_makeup.lips: Natural rosy-pink, slight gloss or bare
default_makeup.overall_look: Fresh-faced, no-makeup makeup — clean and natural, matte even skin
default_makeup.prompt: fresh natural no-makeup look, matte even skin, clean natural lashes, natural brushed brows, bare natural pink-brown lips

expression_default.name: soft open warmth
expression_default.description: Natural, slightly innocent, open and approachable. Warm and accessible energy. She draws people in with openness.
expression_default.prompt: soft open warm expression, natural gaze at camera, approachable and gentle energy, slightly innocent look, lips naturally parted

permanent_core: photorealistic portrait photograph, Jasmine, 24-year-old East Asian woman who looks exactly 24 not younger not older, broad oval face with wide prominent cheekbones, East Asian almond eyes slightly hooded relaxed and natural, dark brown warm hazel irises, clean bare lashes no liner, medium thickness natural dark brows, medium straight-bridged nose with soft natural tip, medium fullness natural bare-pink lips soft natural shape, natural white slightly imperfect teeth visible only when smiling, soft rounded jawline, fair even-toned skin with warm neutral-peachy undertone no flush no redness anywhere, visible natural pores on cheeks and nose, 2 to 3 small acne marks on left cheek, no freckles, natural slight under-eye shadow, clean smooth forehead, matte natural skin finish zero skin smoothing, identical facial proportions and bone structure, zero face morphing allowed, very long dark uniform black-brown poker straight silky hair falling in clean panels over both shoulders, full curvy hourglass figure, very large natural heavy bust with natural drop and deep cleavage, soft defined waist with clear inward curve, wide full hips, full thick thighs, natural full arms, womanly voluptuous curvy body, overtly feminine silhouette
negative_prompt: plastic skin, barbie skin, porcelain skin, airbrushed skin, flawless skin, perfect skin, waxy skin, overly smooth skin, doll-like skin, glass skin, AI artifacts, skin smoothing, beauty filter, plastic texture, uncanny valley, rosy flush, pink cheeks, red cheeks, blushing, flushed cheeks, redness on face, shiny skin, oily skin, glossy skin, heavy eyeliner, winged liner, heavy makeup, full coverage foundation, concealed pores, concealed marks, deformed, blurry, low quality, cartoon, anime, face morphing, different face, changed eye shape, changed nose, changed lips, changed jawline, small breasts, flat chest, slim body, petite body, skinny, underweight, no waist definition, straight body, rectangular body, wavy hair, curly hair, frizzy hair
usage_rules: NEVER add rosy flush, pink cheeks, blushing or any redness to face — Jasmine has zero flush, zero redness, fair even-toned skin only
NEVER add heavy eyeliner — clean natural lashes only unless explicitly requested for a specific look
Always keep hair dark, uniform and poker straight — no highlights, no waves, no frizz
Never change face shape, eye shape, nose, lips, or jawline
Never slim the body down OR push toward obesity — maintain the voluptuous hourglass: defined waist with full hips and large bust
Keep expression warm and open as the default
